<section id="sec-biblio" class="section">
  <div class="page-header">
    <div class="page-label">Back Matter</div>
    <div class="page-title">Bibliography</div>
  </div>
  <p class="body-p" style="margin-bottom:24px;">References are organised by chapter. All citations follow APA 7th edition format.</p>
  <div class="sec-h2" style="font-size:1.1rem; margin-top:20px;">Chapter 1</div>
  <p class="body-p" style="font-size:0.85rem; line-height:1.9; color:var(--text-muted);">
    McKinsey Global Institute. (2023). <em>The value of advanced analytics in industrial operations.</em> McKinsey & Company.<br>
  </p>
</section>
